search_metadata.data_collection_notes: MagicBricks.com was blocked by Cloudflare protection for direct page access (both via agent-browser and curl). Detailed listing data was extracted from search engine snippets. The z-ai web_search API was rate-limited after the first successful query, preventing additional searches and page reads. MagicBricks search results page confirmed there are exactly 2 commercial shops available for rent in Sankarankoil, Tirunelveli.

search_challenges.cloudflare_blocking: MagicBricks.com blocked direct page access via both agent-browser (headless Chrome) and curl, showing Cloudflare 'Access Denied' pages.
search_challenges.api_rate_limiting: The z-ai web_search and page_reader APIs experienced persistent rate limiting (HTTP 429) after the first successful search, preventing additional data retrieval.
search_challenges.google_captcha: Google search was blocked by CAPTCHA verification when accessed via agent-browser.
search_challenges.duckduckgo_captcha: DuckDuckGo showed CAPTCHA challenges, preventing browser-based searches.
search_challenges.wayback_machine: The Wayback Machine had not archived the specific MagicBricks listing URLs.
search_challenges.housing_99acres_blocked: Housing.com and 99acres.com also blocked agent-browser access.

recommendations.description: Visit MagicBricks.com manually from a residential browser to get full listing details including contact information, exact photos, and amenities for both shops.

Contact local estate agents in Sankarankovil via JustDial listing (https://www.justdial.com/Sankarankovil/Estate-Agents-For-Commercial-Rental/nct-10192647) who may have more commercial shop options near the New Bus Stand.

Check Housing.com listing (https://housing.com/commercial/rent/commercial-shop-for-rent-in-sankarankoil-tenkasi-tirunelveli-MA4P6l6bhqj9f6kdxnq) which confirmed commercial shops for rent in Sankarankoil.

Since online listings are extremely limited (only 2 shops on MagicBricks for entire Sankarankoil), conduct an on-ground survey around New Bus Stand and Thiruvengadam Road to find shops with 'To-Let' boards.
Check local Tamil newspapers (Dinakaran, Dinamalar, Daily Thanthi) classifieds for shop rental advertisements in Sankarankovil area.
